name: Boys & Girls Club of Chaffee County Colorado
description: Come play pickleball at Boys & Girls Club of Chaffee County Colorado in Salida, CO! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Centennial Park
description: Centennial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salida, CO. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Chaffee County Fairgrounds - North Building
description: Chaffee County Fairgrounds - North Building is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Poncha Springs, CO. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Chipeta Park
description: Chipeta Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Poncha Springs, CO. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Darren Patterson Christian Academy Gym
description: Darren Patterson Christian Academy Gym is a place to play pickleball in Buena Vista, CO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Mount Princeton Hot Springs Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Mount Princeton Hot Springs Resort in Nathrop, CO! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: River Park Pickleball Courts
description: 6 pickleball courts behind the tennis courts.
